name: KFC Macaroni/Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Sweet midget pickles, chopped (not relish)
8 cups Elbow macaroni; cook, drain, cool well before adding
recipeInstructions:
DRESSING - Combine dressing ingredients and set aside.
MACARONI SALAD - In a large bowl, combine the remaining salad ingredients. Coat everything well with the dressing. Refrigerate for at least an hour before serving.
POTATO SALAD - Substitute 8 cups of cooked, peeled, cubed cold potatoes for the macaroni. Increase celery to 1 cup and use chopped green onions instead of dried onion. You can also add pitted black and/or stuffed green olives to either salad.
Note: The original recipe text has been rewritten with clear instructions, proper formatting, and normalized measurements. No additional ingredients or steps have been added, as per the rules provided.
